Methodology

Data source: Medicare Part D Spending by Drug (dataset ID: partd-drug-spending). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 14,309.

Medicare Part D Spending by Drug reports total spending, claims, and beneficiaries for prescription drugs under the Medicare Part D program.
